title: D6.4 – First set of practice abstracts
description: A report presenting the first eight practice abstracts developed by the Horizon 2020 DECIDE project, summarizing data-driven tools and recommendations for controlling non-EU-regulated contagious animal diseases across cattle, pigs, poultry, and salmon. It aims to facilitate dissemination and uptake of DECIDE innovations by practitioners through concise, user-friendly summaries following the EIP-AGRI common format.
